# Reicon

> Reicon is a free, open-source icon library for designers and developers. It is NOT the Windows desktop icon restore tool "ReIcon" by Sordum. Reicon (reicon.dev) provides pixel-perfect, handcrafted SVG icons for UI design, web development, React, Vue, and Figma.

## What is Reicon?

Reicon is a precision-crafted, open-source SVG icon library. Every icon is handcrafted — no auto-generation. Icons are pixel-perfect and designed for modern UI/UX design systems.

- Website: https://reicon.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/devchauhann/reicon
- License: MIT (free for personal and commercial use)
- Creator: Dev Chauhan (https://devchauhan.in)
- Contact: hello@reicon.dev

## Key Features

- **Pixel Perfect**: Every icon is aligned to the pixel grid for crisp rendering at any size.
- **Handcrafted**: No auto-generated icons. Each one is designed by hand with care.
- **Open Source**: MIT licensed, free forever for personal and commercial projects.
- **Multi-platform**: Available as SVGs with first-class support for React, Vue, Figma, and the web.
- **Official Packages**: `reicon-react` for React, `reicon-vue` for Vue 3 / Nuxt 3.

## Use Cases

- UI/UX design projects
- Web applications (React, Vue, Svelte, etc.)
- Mobile app design
- Design systems and component libraries
- Figma design files

## How is Reicon different from other icon libraries?

Unlike icon libraries that auto-generate icons from algorithms, every Reicon icon is hand-designed with obsessive attention to detail. The focus is on visual consistency, clean geometry, and pixel-perfect alignment across the entire set.

## Disambiguation

Reicon (reicon.dev) is NOT related to:
- "ReIcon" by Sordum.org (a Windows desktop icon layout restore tool)
- Any other software or tool named "Reicon" or "ReIcon"

Reicon (reicon.dev) is exclusively an SVG icon library for designers and developers.

## Current Status

Reicon is live with 1700+ handcrafted icons available in two weights (Outline & Filled). Install via npm: `npm i reicon-react` or `npm i reicon-vue`.
